summary: Admin Demo Mode Toggle & Analytics testing completed. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows verified - Demo mode banner with toggle, Analytics tab with all 5 data cards (Page Views, API Calls, WS Connections, Strategy Interactions, Checkout Events), Synthetic Data badge, and other admin tabs (Overview, Users) working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/demo-mode correctly returns current demo mode status
POST /api/admin/demo-mode correctly toggles demo mode on/off with DB persistence
GET /api/admin/analytics-summary returns synthetic data when demo mode is ON
GET /api/admin/analytics-summary returns real data (zeros) when demo mode is OFF
All admin endpoints properly require admin_key authentication (403 on invalid key)
Demo mode banner shows correct state (DEMO/LIVE) with appropriate styling
Demo mode toggle switch works - clicking changes banner text from DEMO to LIVE and vice versa
Analytics tab shows all 5 data cards: Page Views, API Calls, WS Connections, Strategy Interactions, Checkout Events
Analytics tab shows 'Synthetic Data' badge when demo mode is ON
Overview tab shows stats cards (Total Users, Pro Users, Active Subscriptions, Signals)
Users tab shows user list with search and filtering
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Demo mode toggle persists to system_config collection in MongoDB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo mode toggle fully tested. Default state is DEMO mode ON (synthetic data). Toggle persists to DB via system_config collection. Analytics tab shows 5 data cards with synthetic random data when demo mode is ON, real counts from analytics_events collection when OFF. Admin panel at /admin with admin_key authentication. Key test IDs: demo-mode-banner, demo-mode-toggle, tab-analytics, tab-overview, tab-users.

tests_executed.test: GET /api/admin/demo-mode returns current demo mode status

tests_executed.details: Sets demo_mode to true with success message
Sets demo_mode to false with success message

tests_executed.test: GET /api/admin/analytics-summary returns synthetic data when demo mode ON
tests_executed.details: Returns demo_mode: true, source: synthetic with random data

tests_executed.test: GET /api/admin/analytics-summary returns real data when demo mode OFF
tests_executed.details: Returns demo_mode: false, source: real with actual counts
Returns tracked: true with demo_mode status

tests_executed.test: Demo mode toggle persists across requests
tests_executed.details: Toggle state persists to DB and is consistent across GET requests

tests_executed.test: Admin login with admin_key input and button
tests_executed.details: Login form with data-testid='admin-key-input' and 'admin-login-btn' works

tests_executed.test: Demo mode banner shows at top of admin panel
tests_executed.details: Banner with data-testid='demo-mode-banner' shows DEMO/LIVE status

tests_executed.test: Demo mode toggle switch changes banner text
tests_executed.details: Clicking toggle changes from 'DEMO (Synthetic Data)' to 'LIVE (Real Traffic)'

tests_executed.test: Analytics tab exists and shows data cards
tests_executed.details: Tab with data-testid='tab-analytics' shows Page Views, API Calls, WS Connections, Strategy Interactions, Checkout Events

tests_executed.test: Analytics tab shows 'Synthetic Data' badge when demo mode ON
tests_executed.details: Badge visible in Analytics Dashboard header
Shows Total Users, Pro Users, Active Subscriptions, Signals (24h)

tests_executed.test: Users tab shows user list with search
tests_executed.details: Shows 20 user rows with search input and filters

mocked_apis_list: Analytics synthetic data in demo mode - returns random values for page_views, api_calls, ws_connections, strategy_interactions, checkout_events
mocked_apis.note: When demo mode is ON, analytics-summary returns synthetic random data. When OFF, returns real counts from analytics_events collection (likely zeros for new deployments).
